text: During your turn, all allies and enemies within Range 2 suffer [Damage] 1.

name: demons gem
text: When you fail a scenario, still earn all [Check] from your battle goal if it was completed.

name: shimmering powder
text: After you draw one loot card, draw one additional loot card.

name: lucky dice
text: During your attack ability, treat the next three attack modifier cards you draw as rolling.

name: cursed rock
text:
This item cannot be sold and must be brought into and used every scenario.

At the start of the scenario, perform: [Condition: Curse], [Condition: Ward] self

name: ember energy source
text: During your turn, increase the printed Attack, Move, Target, or Range numeral value of one of your abilities by 1.

name: trainers net
text: During your turn, capture an adjacent enemy whose hit point value is 1 or 2.

name: wanderers club
text: During your attack ability, move the character token on one of your persistent abilities backward one slot and add +X Attack to one attack, where X is the number of your active persistent abilities.

name: recalibration trigger
text:
During your turn, perform one of the two following abilities:
Lose one card from your hand to gain 3 [Time].
-2 [Time]: [Recover] up to two of your discarded cards.

name: spear of justice
text:
During your turn, perform: Attack 2 Range 3
All your banners are treated as additionally occupying the hex of the attacked target for their bonuses and that hex is treated as occupied by an ally this round.

name: soul urn
text:
Place one [Water] in an adjacent hex.
[Element: Dark]

name: black earth codex
text: On the next three deaths of any of your summons, [Consume Element: Earth] or [Consume Element: Dark] and perform: Heal 2 self

name: mask of duality
text: During your ranged attack ability while in [Ranged Form], gain advantage for one attack, then flip this card over. / When an enemy performs an attack targeting you while you are in [Melee Form], the attacker gains disadvantage, then flip this card over.

name: ancestral blade
text: During your turn, activate all your [Song] as if you have just performed a [Song] action.

name: mountains heart
text:
During your turn, you may create either one 1-hex obstacle or hazardous terrain tile in an empty hex within Range 2.
[Consume Element: Fire] or [Consume Element: Earth]

name: sonorous shard
text:
Gain 3 [Wave].
[Consume Element: Air] or [Consume Element: Earth]

name: sly camouflage
text: When you create a trap, place a character token on it. Monsters do not treat the hex with that trap as negative. Remove the token when you [Check] this item.

name: skull of agony
text:
When you suffer damage, if your hit point value is reduced to below half of your maximum, perform: Heal 7 self, [Condition: Curse]
This heal is not affected by and cannot remove negative conditions.

name: storm carving
text: During an attack ability you grant an ally, add [Push] 2 to one of their attacks, then flip this card over. / During your attack ability, add [Pull] 2 to one attack, then flip this card over.

name: freezing orb
text: During your attack ability, add [Condition: Brittle] to one attack and create one 1-hex icy terrain tile in the featureless hex occupied by the target.

name: energized module
text: Remove all damage and negative conditions from one of your summons, then [Energy] [Energy] to that summon.

name: exhaust boots
text:
During your move ability when you have [Fast] or [Slow], add +1 Move, then flip this card over at the end of your turn. / During your turn when you have [Fast], perform: Move 1
Then flip this card over at the end of your turn.

name: warlords skull
text: Whenever you gain [Condition: Invisible] or perform a teleport ability while you have [Condition: Invisible], after the ability perform: Move 1

name: spiraled medallion
text:
When you rest, you may keep up to three [Tides] cards in your active area.
[Consume Element: Light] or [Consume Element: Dark]
